description: This map displays multiple Natura 2000 (N2K) sites, primarily consisting of islands or coastal sections, likely within France given the "FR" prefix in the site codes. Each N2K site is enclosed by a blue outline, representing its main boundary. Surrounding these sites are light grey shaded areas, which denote the buffer zones (Area of Interest or AoI) applied to the N2K sites. Within some of these blue-outlined areas, particularly along coastlines, red outlines are visible. These red outlines indicate adjustments, corrections, or newly included site boundaries, such as the inclusion of missing 2 km buffers, correction of wrongly clipped buffers, or filling of existing gaps. Specific sites are identified by codes: FR8212005, FR8201773, FR8201781, FR8212028, FR8202003, and FR8201777. The map illustrates the N2K Area of Interest (AoI) adjustments made during the second production phase, which began in 2016. No scale bar, compass, legend, or explicit data source year is visible on the map.
